START-001.result: No saved data shows the start screen, hides Resume, and shows the local-only privacy note.

SECURITY-001.result: External runtime URLs and Excel controls are absent; the local PowerPoint bundle loads.

SECURITY-002.result: Meta CSP blocks connection APIs and external resource origins for the single-file app.

ACCESS-001.result: Basic labels, roles, and visible focus styling are present.

START-004.result: Blank start creates one pillar/workstream and opens Structure with tabs ordered Structure, Initiatives, Roadmap.

NAV-001.result: Blank start creates one pillar/workstream and opens Structure with tabs ordered Structure, Initiatives, Roadmap.

STRUCT-001.result: Blank start creates one pillar/workstream and opens Structure with tabs ordered Structure, Initiatives, Roadmap.

PERSIST-001.result: Autosave writes changed roadmap state to localStorage after edits.

START-002.result: Saved state auto-restores into studio and shows restore toast.

PERSIST-002.result: Start fresh from restore toast returns to start while keeping saved data available.

START-005.result: Brand returns to start screen while leaving the saved session resumable.

START-003.result: Resume last session reloads saved roadmap data.

UNDO-001.result: Toolbar undo and redo restore and reapply a pillar rename.

UNDO-002.result: Keyboard undo and redo work on editable structure changes.

STRUCT-002.result: Pillar name edits persist after change events.

STRUCT-003.result: Add pillar appends a pillar and focuses the new name input.

STRUCT-004.result: Pillar up/down controls reorder adjacent pillars.

STRUCT-005.result: Deleting a pillar removes it and leaves a valid remaining outline.

STRUCT-006.result: Workstream name edits persist after change events.

STRUCT-007.result: Add workstream appends a focused blank workstream.

STRUCT-008.result: Enter in a workstream adds a new workstream below and focuses it.

STRUCT-009.result: Backspace on an empty workstream removes it when another workstream remains.

STRUCT-010.result: Workstream up/down controls reorder adjacent workstreams.

STRUCT-011.result: Deleting a workstream removes it and leaves a valid fallback lane when needed.

INIT-001.result: Initiatives tab shows empty state and Add initiative.

INIT-002.result: Add initiative creates the expected default row and values.

INIT-004.result: Changing pillar reassigns the initiative to the first workstream in that pillar.

INIT-005.result: Changing workstream updates the selected workstream.

INIT-006.result: Date edits clamp start/end to prevent negative duration.

INIT-007.result: Milestone toggle sets a one-day item and disables End.

INIT-010.result: Dollar value parses and formats as USD.

INIT-014.result: Realized percentage accepts fractional entry, stores percent points, and formats with a percent sign.

INIT-012.result: Initiative row up/down control reorders rows.

INIT-013.result: Initiative row delete removes the row.

ROAD-002.result: Roadmap renders counts, grouped realized financial totals, per-pillar totals, fiscal/quarter layout, today marker, lanes, item labels, and money labels.

ROAD-003.result: Roadmap renders counts, grouped realized financial totals, per-pillar totals, fiscal/quarter layout, today marker, lanes, item labels, and money labels.

ROAD-004.result: Roadmap renders counts, grouped realized financial totals, per-pillar totals, fiscal/quarter layout, today marker, lanes, item labels, and money labels.

ROAD-005.result: Roadmap renders counts, grouped realized financial totals, per-pillar totals, fiscal/quarter layout, today marker, lanes, item labels, and money labels.

ROAD-012.result: Realized financial totals sum their own value types precisely and ignore the other value type.

ROAD-013.result: Realized financial totals sum their own value types precisely and ignore the other value type.

ROAD-014.result: Roadmap renders counts, grouped realized financial totals, per-pillar totals, fiscal/quarter layout, today marker, lanes, item labels, and money labels.

ROAD-011.result: Not Started roadmap items render black and the legend includes Not Started.

ROAD-006.result: Roadmap tooltip shows item metadata, full money, status, and owner.

ROAD-010.result: Roadmap pillar bands collapse, persist collapsed state, and expand back to show hidden lanes.

ROAD-007.result: Dragging a roadmap item moves its dates.

ROAD-008.result: Dragging an end edge changes the item end date.

ROAD-009.result: Roadmap rerenders with different SVG width after viewport resize.

ROAD-001.result: Empty structure timeline fallback message renders.

FY-001.result: Fiscal year selector updates the selected month and rerenders quarter/FY labels.

PROJECT-001.result: Save downloads a JSON project file with serialized roadmap state.

PROJECT-002.result: Opening a valid project JSON restores the roadmap.

PROJECT-003.result: Invalid project JSON is rejected with a visible error.

EXPORT-003.result: PNG outside Roadmap shows the expected alert.

EXPORT-002.result: PNG export downloads a non-empty roadmap.png.

EXPORT-004.result: PowerPoint export downloads a deck with one human-readable slide per pillar.

PRESENT-001.result: Present mode hides editing chrome and shows presentation state.

PRESENT-002.result: Dark presentation toggle changes palette state and button label.

STRUCT-012.result: Structure workstreams show initiative counts for populated lanes.
